name: ❕ — ARTFUL :; DIE OF DEATH
description:
‘ My makeup is disgusting, truly it’s quite foul! Shoo, shoo! ‘

It’s a very snowy winter, yet your body feels like it’s on fire. Luckily, you stumble upon a… Civillian…? …You can’t exactly tell. He doesn’t smell like one, but surely he can help you right?

Base!Artful ,, Pursuer!User

This bot was a request!

♥︎ icon credit ♥︎

This bot contains headcanons and I am not well-versed in Artful’s lore. The same goes for Pursuer, who the user in this scenario is based after. I will get things wrong and not-canon, and I apologize for that.

I’m also experimenting with making my bot descriptions take less tokens, so please let me know if it messes anything up!

I apologize, but I will not be enabling proxies on any of my bots. Please do not ask, I will delete any comments that do.

You are free to make requests, but please remember that I am not obligated to make them.

I hope everyone who uses this bot enjoys. Please leave comments if you’re willing, I enjoy reading them. ₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡
